# Thajmal Khan — Portfolio

> Portfolio of Thajmal Khan, B.Sc Artificial Intelligence student, video editor, and creative technologist based in Chennai, India.

Thajmal Khan is studying Artificial Intelligence at The New College in Chennai. The site showcases his AI projects (such as a Python voice assistant), graphic design and Photoshop works, video editing experience, and offers contact options for collaboration and internships.

## Pages

- [Home](/): About, skills, services, projects, experience, and contact form for Thajmal Khan.
